global.description: The ad features a combination of text and graphic elements centered around a financial service.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main visual element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears to be a combination of shapes, possibly representing a product or service.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: Another central graphic element, likely complementing the main visual, featuring a different shape.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element positioned lower in the ad, possibly indicating a feature or option.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: Another small circular graphic element, similar in size and position to the previous one.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A third small circular graphic element, maintaining the same visual style as the others.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A prominent text element in the center of the ad, conveying the message 'Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind' in a bold font.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'ClearLedger' displayed at the top of the ad in a clear, bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold text, financial service promotion
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, with small graphic elements below, and the CTA at the bottom.
